originalTitle: Gears of War: E-Day - Official Gameplay Trailer | Xbox Games Showcase 2026
content: A younger Marcus Fenix takes center stage in this thrilling and brutal gameplay trailer for Gears of War: E-Day, the upcoming title that is set 14 years before the original game and that will be released on October 6, 2026. This title will also be the focus of the stream after the Xbox Games Showcase as its getting its very own Gears of War: E-Day Direct that will dive deeper into the much-anticipated title. #IGN #Xbox #SummerOfGaming
chineseContent: 年轻的马库斯·菲尼克斯 (Marcus Fenix) 在《战争机器：E-Day》这部惊心动魄、残酷的游戏预告片中占据了中心位置，这款即将推出的游戏的背景设定在原版游戏 14 年前，将于 2026 年 10 月 6 日发布。该游戏也将成为 Xbox 游戏展示会之后直播的焦点，因为它拥有自己的《战争机器：E-Day Direct》，将更深入地探讨这款备受期待的游戏。 #IGN #Xbox #SummerOfGaming
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
